title: Safeguarding prompt documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports child-centred, private and accessible communication, consent to examination, and recording actual words and disagreements.
examination.rationale: Supports communication, consent and accurate records for child safeguarding documentation; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports child-centred, private and accessible communication, consent to examination, and recording actual words and disagreements.

assessment.text: Supports observing the child and interactions, communicating directly and privately where appropriate, non-leading exploration and structured family or care-environment context.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-led safeguarding assessment context for child safeguarding documentation; no decision is generated.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports observing the child and interactions, communicating directly and privately where appropriate, non-leading exploration and structured family or care-environment context.

referral.text: Supports recognising indirect disclosure, using open non-leading questions, explaining next steps and recording local safeguarding referral when clinician-completed.
referral.rationale: Supports responding to disclosure and recording concern for child safeguarding documentation; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports recognising indirect disclosure, using open non-leading questions, explaining next steps and recording local safeguarding referral when clinician-completed.

sources_used.title: Child abuse and neglect
sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; UAE safeguarding law and pathways govern local use

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Presenting concern, exact child or caregiver account, observations, injuries, immediate safety, people present, clinician assessment, actions and referrals remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child safeguarding documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
